ai_provider.title: AI Provider
ai_provider.description:
Choose how Culiplan AI features run in Home Assistant.

**Cloud AI** — Culiplan processes requests (Premium subscription required).
**BYOK** — Your API key is stored locally and sent directly to the AI provider; Culiplan never sees it.
**Local AI** — Requests go to your local Ollama or LM Studio endpoint.

data_description.byok_api_key: Stored in Home Assistant only — never sent to Culiplan.

mealie_offer.title: Import from Mealie?
mealie_offer.description:
Do you want to import your recipes, shopping lists and meal plans from a Mealie instance?

This is optional and can be skipped. You will be asked for your Mealie URL and an API token.

mealie_credentials.title: Mealie Connection
mealie_credentials.description: Enter your Mealie URL and an API token. Culiplan will perform a dry run to preview what will be imported before any data is written.

data_description.mealie_token: Long-lived API token from Mealie Settings > API Tokens. This is NOT stored by Culiplan after the import.

mealie_preview.title: Import Preview
mealie_preview.description:
Culiplan analysed your Mealie library:

- **{will_import}** recipes ready to import
- **{will_flag}** recipes flagged for review (servings, nutrition or ingredient headings need attention)
- **{will_skip}** recipes skipped (no name)

Unparseable ingredient samples: {samples}

Confirm to start the import. You can roll back within 24 hours from the integration options.

mealie_progress.title: Importing from Mealie
mealie_progress.description: Import in progress. This may take a few minutes depending on the size of your library. Culiplan will notify Home Assistant when complete.

mealie_done.title: Import Complete

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Culiplan
reauth_confirm.description: Your Culiplan session has expired. Click Submit to re-authenticate.

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key — please check the key and try again.
error.invalid_endpoint: Could not reach the local AI endpoint. Check the URL and that the service is running.
error.invalid_mealie_url: Could not connect to the Mealie instance. Check the URL and that Mealie is running.
error.mealie_unreachable: Culiplan could not reach your Mealie instance. Check that the URL is accessible from the Culiplan server.
error.mealie_timeout: The Mealie import timed out. Try again or check your Mealie instance.

abort.missing_configuration: Integration not configured. Please configure it in the UI.

data.rollback: Roll back Mealie import (removes all imported data within 24 h)

abort.rollback_complete: Rollback complete. All Mealie-imported data has been removed.
abort.rollback_failed: Rollback failed. Please try again or remove the data manually.

reauth_required.title: Re-authentication required for Culiplan
reauth_required.description: Your Culiplan session has expired. Re-authenticate your account.

pantry_barcode_not_found.title: Culiplan: Barcode not found in pantry
pantry_barcode_not_found.description: The barcode {barcode} was scanned but no matching item was found in your Culiplan pantry. Open Culiplan and add an item with this barcode, then scanning it again will resolve this issue.

confirm.title: Upgrade Culiplan
confirm.description:
To use {feature}, you need a Culiplan Premium subscription.

[Open upgrade page]({upgrade_url})

byok_key_missing.message: No BYOK key found for provider {provider}. Please reconfigure the Culiplan integration.

pantry_item_not_found.message: No pantry item with barcode {barcode} found. Add the item to your pantry in Culiplan first.

blueprint_envelope_missing.message: Backend returned no prompt envelope for blueprint generation.

no_active_cooking_session.message: No active cooking session. Call culiplan.start_cooking_mode first.

cooking_already_last_step.message: Already at the last step ({current}/{total}). Use culiplan.complete_cooking_mode to finish.

no_paused_cooking_session.message: No paused cooking session found. Nothing to resume.

timer_not_found.message: No timer with label or id {label_or_id} found in the active session.
